SEARCH
Module ProjetGenieLogicel3
Package ui

Class CreateDialogs

java.lang.Object
ui.CreateDialogs
public class CreateDialogs extends Object
Contains creation dialogs used by the application.

      public CreateDialogs()

  • Method Details

    • showNodeDialog

      public static Optional<CreateDialogs.NodeData> showNodeDialog()
      Shows the node creation dialog. If the selected node type is ACCIDENT, accident and patient fields are displayed.
      Returns:
      node data if the user clicks OK

    • showEditNodeDialog

      public static Optional<CreateDialogs.EditNodeData> showEditNodeDialog(Node node)
      Displays a dialog to edit an existing node.
      Parameters:
      node - the node to edit
      Returns:
      an Optional containing the updated node data, or empty if cancelled

    • showAgentDialog

      public static Optional<CreateDialogs.AgentData> showAgentDialog(Set<Integer> availableNodeIds)
      Displays a dialog to create a new agent.
      Parameters:
      availableNodeIds - set of valid destination node IDs
      Returns:
      an Optional containing the agent data, or empty if cancelled

    • showEdgeDialog

      public static Optional<CreateDialogs.EdgeData> showEdgeDialog()
      Displays a dialog to create a new edge.
      Returns:
      an Optional containing the edge data, or empty if cancelled

      private static int parseInt(String value, int fallback)
      Converts text to int.

      fallback - default value if conversion fails

      parsed value or fallback
